text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Al Arabiya: Pakistan has asked the United States and Iran to extend the ceasefire by an additional two weeks. Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif may announce the extension tomorrow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 阿拉伯电视台：巴基斯坦已要求美国和伊朗将停火协议再延长两周。巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫可能会在明天宣布延期。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf accused U.S. President Trump of trying to turn the negotiating table into a table of surrender. He reaffirmed that Iran will not accept negotiations under threats. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫指责美国总统特朗普试图将谈判桌变成投降桌。他重申，伊朗不会接受在威胁下进行谈判。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 "I advise US Vice President JD Vance to unpack his suitcases and not to head to Islamabad. With the current delusional and unrealistic demands and the continued naval blockade, no one in Tehran is willing to negotiate with him." - Professor Marandi 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “我建议美国副总统JD·万斯收拾好行李，不要前往伊斯兰堡。鉴于目前这种妄想且不切实际的要求以及持续的海上封锁，德黑兰没有人愿意与他谈判。”——马兰迪教授 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Trump, by imposing a siege and violating the ceasefire, seeks to turn this negotiating table— in his own imagination— into a table of surrender or to justify renewed warmongering. We do not accept negotiations under the shadow of threats, and in the past two weeks, we have prepared to reveal new cards on the battlefield.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：特朗普通过实施围困和违反停火协议，试图将他想象中的谈判桌变成投降桌，或者为重新挑起战争寻找借口。我们不接受在威胁阴影下的谈判，在过去两周里，我们已经准备好在战场上亮出新牌。

text: 🇮🇷 JUST IN! Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf: Trump, by imposing a siege and violating the ceasefire, seeks to transform what he imagines to be a negotiating table into a table of surrender — or to justify renewed warmongering. We will not accept negotiations under the shadow of threats, and over the past two weeks we have been preparing to play new cards on the battlefield. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 快讯！伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫：特朗普通过实施围困和违反停火协议，试图将他想象中的谈判桌变成投降桌，或者为重新挑起战争寻找借口。我们不会接受在威胁阴影下的谈判，在过去两周里，我们一直在准备在战场上打出新牌。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Times of Israel: The U.S. is expected to ask Lebanon to repeal its law criminalizing contact between Israeli and Lebanese citizens at the upcoming second round of negotiations between Israel and Lebanon on Thursday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列时报：预计美国将在周四举行的以色列与黎巴嫩第二轮谈判中，要求黎巴嫩废除将以色列和黎巴嫩公民之间的接触定为犯罪的法律。 @wfwitness

text: Senator Jon Ossoff on Jared Kushner: He's on the Saudi payroll for two billion dollars. And now he's leading American diplomacy in the Middle East apparently while at the very same time asking princes and sheikhs across the Arab world to give him billions more. Can you imagine like a normal sitting US ambassador just hitting up Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman for billions of dollars? And it's not just Jared getting in on the action. A company owned in part by Eric and Don Jr has been pitching Gulf Kingdoms on its drone interceptors during this war. Never before have we seen so little effort to hide so much corruption. The Mar-a-Lago mafia has taken American corruption to spectacular new heights.
text_zh: 参议员乔恩·奥索夫谈贾里德·库什纳：他拿着沙特两十亿美元的薪水。现在他显然在领导美国在中东的外交工作，同时还在要求阿拉伯世界的王子和酋长们给他更多的数十亿美元。你能想象一个正常的美国现任大使向沙特王储穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼索要数十亿美元吗？而且不仅仅是贾里德参与其中。一家由埃里克和小唐纳德部分拥有的公司一直在向海湾王国推销其无人机拦截器。我们从未见过如此明目张胆的腐败。海湖庄园黑帮将美国的腐败提升到了一个惊人的新高度。

text: OSINTdefender According to Al Arabiya, Pakistani Prime Minister Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has asked the U.S. and Iran to extend the nominal ceasefire, set to expire in the next 48 hours, two extra weeks, as both sides find it increasingly hard to find points of convergence that would enable a more long-term ceasefire framework to be implemented. This, as negotiations in Islamabad, Pakistan, set for the next 24 hours continue to shape out. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据阿拉比亚电视台报道，巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫已要求美国和伊朗将名义上的停火协议延长两周，该协议原定于未来48小时内到期，因为双方越来越难以找到能够实现更长期停火框架的共识点。与此同时，定于未来24小时在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡举行的谈判仍在筹备中。推文

text: Open Source Intel Mohammad Marandi, adviser to Iran's negotiation team in the previous Pakistan round, tells Al Mayadeen there was no intention to send an Iranian delegation to Pakistan for further talks. He added that one of Iran's conditions for attending is a public U.S. declaration on lifting the naval blockade. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 上一轮巴基斯坦谈判中伊朗谈判小组的顾问穆罕默德·马兰迪告诉马亚丁电视台，伊朗无意派遣代表团前往巴基斯坦进行进一步会谈。他补充说，伊朗参加会谈的条件之一是美国公开宣布解除海上封锁。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Senior Iranian negotiators will only travel to talks in Pakistan if Vance is present -MSNOW tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗高级谈判代表只有在万斯出席的情况下才会前往巴基斯坦参加会谈 -MSNOW 推文

text: OSINTdefender Apple has announced that John Ternus, the senior vice president of hardware engineering, will take over as CEO of the company on September 1, 2026, as Tim Cook prepares to step down after 15 years in the role. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046336098566033483/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 苹果公司宣布，硬件工程高级副总裁约翰·特努斯将于2026年9月1日接任公司首席执行官，蒂姆·库克在担任该职位15年后准备卸任。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046336098566033483/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Rafael Advanced Defense Systems Chairman Yuval Steinitz: "Within 3 to 5 years, we will be able to develop a laser that can also intercept ballistic missiles from Iran." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 拉斐尔先进防御系统公司董事长尤瓦尔·斯坦尼茨：“在3到5年内，我们将能够开发出一种也能拦截伊朗弹道导弹的激光武器。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli PM Netanyahu: We haven't finished the job in Iran yet. The world already knows our determination to defend ourselves. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046335325690098061/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡：我们在伊朗的任务还没有完成。世界已经知道我们捍卫自己的决心。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046335325690098061/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Trump is invoking war powers to steer federal funding into coal, oil, LNG, framing it as “national security.” Critics say it props up aging, costly plants, raises prices, and stretches emergency powers to favor fossil fuel companies. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普正在援引战争权力将联邦资金引导至煤炭、石油和液化天然气领域，并将其包装为“国家安全”。批评人士称，这支撑了老化且昂贵的工厂，推高了价格，并滥用紧急权力来偏袒化石燃料公司。推文

text: Open Source Intel IAEA chief Rafael Grossi on a potential U.S.-Iran nuclear deal: "Only the IAEA can ensure compliance." Any agreement without UN-backed verification would be meaningless. Grossi warned the current climate is "very fragile" and could lead to up to 20 countries pursuing nuclear weapons. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 国际原子能机构负责人拉斐尔·格罗西谈到潜在的美国-伊朗核协议时表示：“只有国际原子能机构才能确保合规。” 任何没有联合国支持的核查的协议都是毫无意义的。格罗西警告称，当前气候“非常脆弱”，可能导致多达20个国家寻求核武器。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer has stepped down from her post, with a formal announcement expected shortly -NOTUS https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046333856211513412/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国劳工部长洛里·查韦斯-德雷默已辞去职务，预计很快会有正式公告 -NOTUS https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046333856211513412/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Amazon announces it is investing up to $25 billion in Anthropic, while Anthropic commits to spending more than $100 billion over the next 10 years on AWS technologies and securing up to 5 GW of Amazon’s Trainium chips to train and power its advanced AI models. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046332483596091489/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 亚马逊宣布向Anthropic投资高达250亿美元，同时Anthropic承诺在未来10年内投入超过1000亿美元用于AWS技术，并确保获得高达5 GW的亚马逊Trainium芯片，以训练和驱动其先进的AI模型。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046332483596091489/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor This is how “forever wars” begin. Reporting says he’s already “bored” with it, so it drags on, fades into the background, and becomes just another war people stop talking about while the consequences keep stacking up. Trump rages at Iran war criticism: "Time is not my adversary" https://trib.al/CZLRbnb - Axios tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这就是“永久战争”开始的方式。报道称他已经对此感到“厌倦”，所以战争拖延下去，逐渐淡出人们的视野，变成另一场人们不再谈论的战争，而后果却在不断堆积。特朗普对伊朗战争批评感到愤怒：“时间不是我的对手” https://trib.al/CZLRbnb - Axios 推文

text: The Spectator Index Amazon is set to invest up to $25 billion in Anthropic. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2046330815873950112/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 亚马逊准备向Anthropic投资高达250亿美元。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2046330815873950112/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated The oil refinery in Tuapse is still burning after the night attack. What a beautiful sight. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046330620167479634/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 图阿普谢的炼油厂在夜间袭击后仍在燃烧。多么美丽的景象。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046330620167479634/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down, will be replaced by John Ternus in September. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 苹果首席执行官蒂姆·库克即将卸任，将于9月由约翰·特努斯接替。推文

text: White House: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer will be leaving the Administration to take a position in the private sector.
text_zh: 白宫：劳工部长洛里·查韦斯-德雷默（Lori Chavez-DeRemer）将离开政府，前往私营部门任职。

text: A small, early trial of a personalized mRNA cancer vaccine (autogene cevumeran by BioNTech) showed that about half of pancreatic cancer patients developed a strong immune response, with most of those still alive 4–6 years later. It works by training the immune system to target each patient’s specific tumor mutations after surgery. In the trial (16 patients), 8 developed a strong immune response. Of those, 7 were still alive up to 6 years later, compared to much worse outcomes in non-responders. A larger Phase 2 trial is already underway to confirm whether the vaccine truly improves survival. Pancreatic cancer is so dangerous because it’s hard to detect early, spreads fast, and is difficult to treat. Source: NBC News
text_zh: 一项针对个性化mRNA癌症疫苗（BioNTech公司的autogene cevumeran）的小型早期试验显示，约半数胰腺癌患者产生了强烈的免疫反应，其中大多数人在4-6年后仍然存活。其工作原理是在手术后训练免疫系统靶向每个患者特定的肿瘤突变。在试验中（16名患者），8人产生了强烈的免疫反应。其中7人在长达6年后仍然存活，而无反应者的预后则差得多。一项更大规模的二期试验正在进行中，以确认该疫苗是否确实能提高生存率。胰腺癌之所以危险，是因为它难以早期发现、扩散迅速且难以治疗。来源：NBC新闻

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 NOTUS: U.S. Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer has resigned from her role on April 20, with a formal announcement expected soon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 NOTUS：美国劳工部长洛里·查韦斯-德雷默已于4月20日辞职，预计很快会有正式公告。 @wfwitness

text: Egyptian and Turkish special forces trained together in Libya during Flintlock 2026, alongside the U.S. and other partners. The drills in Sirte, a former flashpoint where the two sides nearly clashed in 2020, highlight a major thaw in relations and growing coordination.
text_zh: 埃及和土耳其特种部队在2026年“燧发枪”演习期间与美国及其他伙伴在利比亚进行了联合训练。在苏尔特（Sirte）进行的演习——这里曾是2020年双方几乎发生冲突的爆发点——凸显了双边关系的重大缓和以及日益增长的协调。

text: The U.S. halted funding, security coordination, and dollar shipments to Iraq to pressure its stalled government formation. Iraq’s Central Bank denies any disruption. Washington already has major leverage over Iraq’s economy (it effectively controls oil revenue dollar flows via U.S. systems) and has previously threatened to restrict those dollars to push back on Iranian influence. Source: Al Hadath
text_zh: 美国停止了对伊拉克的资金、安全协调和美元运送，以向其陷入僵局的政府组建进程施压。伊拉克中央银行否认有任何中断。华盛顿已经对伊拉克经济拥有重大杠杆作用（它通过美国系统有效控制石油收入的美元流动），并曾威胁要限制这些美元以抵制伊朗的影响。来源：Al Hadath

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧 The suspicious bag found in the Corniche al-Mazraa area of Beirut, which was subjected to a controlled detonation by security forces, was later found to contain only clothes. @wfwitness" Turns out the only thing explosive inside was someone’s fashion choices.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇱🇧 在贝鲁特 Corniche al-Mazraa 地区发现的可疑包裹，经安全部队控制爆破后，发现里面只有衣服。@wfwitness” 事实证明，里面唯一爆炸的东西是某人的时尚品味。

text: Tim Cook will step down as CEO of Apple after more than a decade in the role. John Ternus will take over as CEO on September 1, while Cook transitions to executive chairman.
text_zh: 蒂姆·库克（Tim Cook）在担任苹果公司首席执行官十多年后将卸任。约翰·特努斯（John Ternus）将于9月1日接任首席执行官，而库克将转任执行董事长。

text: The U.S. Air Force will extend the A-10 Thunderbolt II (Warthog) into service until around 2030, reversing earlier plans to retire it sooner.
text_zh: 美国空军将把A-10“雷电II”（疣猪）攻击机的服役期延长至2030年左右，推翻了此前计划提前退役的决定。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧 A suspicious bag was discovered in the Corniche al-Mazraa area of Beirut, prompting security forces to cordon off the area and launch an investigation. The security forces carried out a controlled detonation of the bag a few moments ago. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 The suspicious bag found in the Corniche al-Mazraa area of Beirut, which was subjected to a controlled detonation by security forces, was later found to contain only clothes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇱🇧 在贝鲁特 Corniche al-Mazraa 地区发现了一个可疑包裹，促使安全部队封锁了该地区并展开调查。安全部队刚才对该包裹进行了控制爆破。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 在贝鲁特 Corniche al-Mazraa 地区发现的可疑包裹，经安全部队控制爆破后，发现里面只有衣服。@wfwitness

text: Pakistan has put a $1.5 billion arms deal with Sudan on hold after Saudi Arabia refused to finance it and urged cancellation. The deal, reportedly covering jets and weapons, was near completion, but Riyadh’s shift (partly due to concerns over regional conflicts and external pressure) stalled it. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 在沙特阿拉伯拒绝提供资金并敦促取消后，巴基斯坦搁置了与苏丹的一项15亿美元的军火交易。据报道，该交易涵盖喷气式飞机和武器，已接近完成，但利雅得的立场转变（部分原因是担心地区冲突和外部压力）使其陷入停滞。来源：路透社

text: 📝 Иранская война 📝 главные события к исходу 20 апреля Американцы ещё в ночь сами подлили масла в огонь. В Оманском заливе ВМС США захватили иранский контейнеровоз TOUSKA , открыв огонь по машинному отделению и высадив досмотровую группу. В Тегеране это сразу назвали пиратством и нарушением перемирия, а на фоне такого силового давления шансы на новый раунд переговоров с Исламабадом стали выглядеть еще хуже. ➡️ Собственно, и без того большого доверия к переговорам уже не было. Американская делегация, по данным СМИ, всё же отправилась в Пакистан , но в Тегеране четкого согласия не дали. Ситуация всё больше напоминает зимнюю историю со «швейцарским треком» , когда в Вашингтоне под разговоры о дипломатии просто тянули время, параллельно усиливая военную группировку. ➡️ Параллельно у американской блокады может появиться новый раздражитель. В Сети пишут, что Китай перебросил в Оманский залив три корабля для сопровождения своих торговых судов. Если информация подтвердится, у США возникнет совсем другой уровень проблемы: одно дело останавливать гражданские суда, и совсем другое — пытаться давить на трафик под прикрытием китайского флота. ➡️ В самом Иране власти стараются одновременно держать фронт и гасить внутреннее напряжение. На этом фоне в Тегеране повысили МРОТ более чем на 60% и увеличили соцвыплаты. Но при официальной инфляции в 68% это не рост благополучия, а попытка хотя бы немного притормозить обеднение населения после войны и блокады. ➡️ На ливанском направлении Израиль продолжает не «удержание безопасности», а методичное перемалывание территории. АОИ ровняет Бинт-Джубайль , превращая его в очередной элемент «буферной зоны». Для израильтян это ещё и символическая история: город давно считается одним из знаков сопротивления «Хезболлы», так что его демонстративное уничтожение несёт и политический, и психологический смысл. ➡️ На этом фоне скандал вызвал и другой эпизод на юге Ливана : израильский солдат разрушил статую Иисуса Христа в захваченном Дебле, а сослуживцы сняли это на видео. В АОИ пообещали разобраться, но проблема тут явно шире одного солдата — эпизод лишь лег на уже существующий фон нападок на христианские святыни и ограничений для христиан в самом Израиле. ➡️ В Сирии тем временем режим в Дамаске продолжает зачищать противников, но иногда получает ответ. В районе Джеблы силовики во время рейда по поиску сторонников прежней власти столкнулись с вооружённым сопротивлением: один из родственников задержанных офицеров открыл огонь, убил одного силовика и ранил ещё нескольких, после чего был ликвидирован. ➡️ Израильтяне тем временем продолжают быстро перенимать опыт войны дронов. Для АОИ теперь собираются закупить ещё 12 тысяч ударных FPV-дронов с ночными камерами и управлением через AR-очки. После ударов «Хезболлы» по бронетехнике в Тель-Авиве явно поняли, что без массового дешёвого беспилотного компонента дальше воевать будет слишком накладно. 📎 Карты в высоком разрешении: 🔸 Очаги нестабильности ( ru ; en ) #дайджест #Израиль #Ирак #Иран #Ливан #Пакистан #Сирия #США ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 伊朗战争 📝 4月20日晚间主要事件 美国人早在夜间就火上浇油。在美国海军在阿曼湾扣押了伊朗集装箱船“TOUSKA”号，向机舱开火并派出登船检查小组后。德黑兰立即称此为海盗行为和违反停火协议，在这种武力压力下，与伊斯兰堡进行新一轮谈判的机会看起来更加渺茫。 ➡️ 实际上，人们对谈判本已没有多少信任。据媒体报道，美国代表团确实前往了巴基斯坦，但德黑兰并未给予明确同意。局势越来越让人想起冬天的“瑞士轨道”故事，当时华盛顿在谈论外交的同时只是在拖延时间，并同时加强了军事部署。 ➡️ 同时，美国的封锁可能会出现一个新的刺激因素。网络上有消息称，中国向阿曼湾派遣了三艘军舰为其商船护航。如果消息属实，美国将面临一个完全不同层面的问题：拦截民用船只是一回事，试图在有中国海军掩护的情况下施压则是另一回事。 ➡️ 在伊朗国内，当局正试图同时守住前线并平息内部紧张局势。在此背景下，德黑兰将最低工资提高了60%以上，并增加了社会福利。但在68%的官方通胀率下，这并非福利增长，而是试图在战争和封锁后至少稍微减缓民众贫困化的尝试。 ➡️ 在黎巴嫩方向，以色列继续进行的不是“维持安全”，而是对领土的系统性碾压。以色列国防军（IDF）正在夷平宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil），将其变成“缓冲区”的又一个组成部分。对以色列人来说，这还有一个象征意义：该市长期以来被视为“真主党”抵抗的标志之一，因此对其进行示威性摧毁具有政治和心理意义。 ➡️ 在此背景下，黎巴嫩南部发生的另一件事也引发了丑闻：一名以色列士兵在占领的德布尔（Debel）摧毁了一尊耶稣基督雕像，同事们将其拍摄了下来。以色列国防军承诺进行调查，但问题显然不仅仅是一个士兵——这一事件只是加剧了对基督教圣地的攻击以及以色列国内对基督徒限制的现有背景。 ➡️ 与此同时，在叙利亚，大马士革政权继续清洗反对者，但有时会遭到反击。在杰布莱（Jableh）地区，安全部队在搜捕前政权支持者的突袭中遭遇武装抵抗：一名被捕军官的亲属开火，打死一名安全人员并打伤数人，随后被击毙。 ➡️ 与此同时，以色列人继续迅速吸收无人机战争的经验。以色列国防军现在计划再购买1.2万架配备夜视摄像头和AR眼镜控制系统的FPV自杀式无人机。在真主党对装甲车辆进行打击后，特拉维夫显然意识到，如果没有大规模廉价的无人机组件，继续作战将过于昂贵。 📎 高分辨率地图： 🔸 不稳定热点 ( ru ; en ) #摘要 #以色列 #伊拉克 #伊朗 #黎巴嫩 #巴基斯坦 #叙利亚 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan has asked the U.S. and Iran to extend the ceasefire by an additional two weeks, according to Al Arabiya, citing Pakistani media. PM Shahbaz Sharif may announce the extension tomorrow. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046329819399340307/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：据阿拉伯电视台援引巴基斯坦媒体报道，巴基斯坦已要求美国和伊朗将停火协议延长两周。总理夏巴兹·谢里夫（Shahbaz Sharif）可能于明天宣布延期。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046329819399340307/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Apple announces that John Ternus will become CEO on September 1, 2026, with Tim Cook remaining CEO until the summer, to oversee the transition process. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046327935955599805/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down, with John Ternus set to take over, 9to5Mac reports. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046327879214965179/photo/1 tweet

text: WarTranslated The Russian military blogger "Rybar" has started complaining that Russia is losing all the progress it has made over the past year in the offensive near Zaporizhzhia. According to him, the Armed Forces of Ukraine's superiority in drones and trained operators is playing a major role. Drone strikes on Russian convoys in the Melitopol area have also become more frequent. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：俄罗斯军事博主“Rybar”开始抱怨俄罗斯正在失去过去一年在扎波罗热附近进攻中取得的所有进展。据他称，乌克兰武装部队在无人机和训练有素的操作员方面的优势发挥了重要作用。对梅利托波尔地区俄罗斯车队的无人机袭击也变得更加频繁。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @horia85 : Romanian Think Tank New Strategy Center publishes “(Con)Trolling the Russian Information Warfare Efforts: North Atlantic Fella Organization’s Digital Activism against Moscow’s Wartime Propaganda”, a study dedicated to one of the most unconventional phenomena of contemporary information warfare: the role of memetic culture and digital activism in support of Ukraine. 📍 The study analyzes how the North Atlantic Fella Organization ( #NAFO ) has asserted itself as a decentralized digital actor, able to combine humor, irony, and online visual culture with concrete goals of challenging Russian propaganda and mobilizing international solidarity for Ukraine. The analysis follows both the offensive dimension of memetic activism — by ridiculing pro-Kremlin narratives — and the defensive dimension, by strengthening the legitimacy and informational resilience of the pro-Ukrainian camp. 📣 By exploring the relationship between hybrid warfare, influence operations and so-called "memetic warfare", the study shows that NAFO is not only a viral expression of internet culture, but also a relevant example of how digital communities can produce symbolic, political and even material effects in conflict contexts. At the same time, the analysis highlights how such forms of online mobilization can function as tools of civic resilience, crowdfunding and transnational support in a war marked by narrative competition and informational confrontation. 📍 The study thus proposes a broader reflection on the transformation of digital activism in the context of contemporary conflicts and on how new forms of online participation can influence both the information space and the broader architecture of democratic resistance to hybrid aggression. 📚 The analysis was carried out by Răzvan Ceuca, expert in cyber and international relations at the New Strategy Center, and the peer review was done by Iulian Popa, Senior Associate Expert, New Strategy Center. The study can be accessed here: https://newstrategycenter.ro/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ConTrolling-the-Russian-Information-Warfare-Efforts-1.pdf tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix RT @horia85：罗马尼亚智库“新战略中心”（New Strategy Center）发布了《（反）控制俄罗斯的信息战努力：北大西洋Fella组织针对莫斯科战时宣传的数字行动主义》，这是一项致力于当代信息战中最非传统现象之一的研究：模因文化和数字行动主义在支持乌克兰方面的作用。 📍 该研究分析了北大西洋Fella组织（#NAFO）如何将自己确立为一个去中心化的数字行动者，能够将幽默、讽刺和在线视觉文化与挑战俄罗斯宣传和动员国际社会声援乌克兰的具体目标相结合。分析既关注模因行动主义的进攻维度——通过嘲笑亲克里姆林宫的叙事，也关注防御维度——通过加强亲乌克兰阵营的合法性和信息韧性。 📣 通过探索混合战争、影响行动和所谓的“模因战争”之间的关系，该研究表明，NAFO不仅是互联网文化的病毒式表达，也是数字社区如何在冲突背景下产生象征性、政治甚至物质影响的相关例子。同时，分析强调了这种在线动员形式如何能够作为公民韧性、众筹和跨国支持的工具，在以叙事竞争和信息对抗为特征的战争中发挥作用。 📍 因此，该研究提出了关于当代冲突背景下数字行动主义转型的更广泛反思，以及在线参与的新形式如何影响信息空间和民主抵抗混合侵略的更广泛架构。 📚 该分析由新战略中心网络和国际关系专家Răzvan Ceuca进行，同行评审由新战略中心高级副专家Iulian Popa完成。研究可在此处访问：https://newstrategycenter.ro/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ConTrolling-the-Russian-Information-Warfare-Efforts-1.pdf 推文

text: Open Source Intel Tuapse refinery still burning. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046326465830981799/photo/1 Ukrainian drones struck Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery overnight, igniting the tank farm. Russian officials reported one dead and one injured, marking the second hit on the Rosneft site in under a week. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046152684453933312/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：图阿普谢（Tuapse）炼油厂仍在燃烧。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046326465830981799/photo/1 乌克兰无人机连夜袭击了俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂，点燃了储油罐区。俄罗斯官员报告称有一人死亡，一人受伤，这是不到一周内该俄罗斯石油公司（Rosneft）设施第二次遭到袭击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046152684453933312/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Retired Four-Star General Jack Keane: "We have twice as much combat air in the region today than we did when we began the war some weeks ago." Keane says the U.S. has significant leverage heading into the next round of talks with Iran. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046325617075851320/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：退役四星上将杰克·基恩（Jack Keane）：“我们今天在该地区的作战空中力量是几周前战争开始时的两倍。”基恩表示，美国在进入与伊朗的下一轮谈判时拥有重要的杠杆作用。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046325617075851320/video/1 推文

text: 🇲🇽 A man opened fire at the Teotihuacan pyramid complex near Mexico City on Monday, killing a Canadian woman before turning the gun on himself. Four others were wounded by gunfire and two more injured in falls, according to local authorities. Mexico's security cabinet confirmed the wounded were receiving medical care. Russia's consul general said the Russian embassy is verifying reports that a Russian national was among those wounded in the attack. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇲🇽 周一，一名男子在墨西哥城附近的特奥蒂瓦坎（Teotihuacan）金字塔群开火，打死一名加拿大女子，随后自杀。据当地当局称，另有四人被枪击伤，两人在跌倒时受伤。墨西哥安全内阁证实伤者正在接受医疗护理。俄罗斯总领事表示，俄罗斯大使馆正在核实有关一名俄罗斯公民在袭击中受伤的报道。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Tim Cook is stepping down as Apple CEO on September 1, with John Ternus set to take over while Cook transitions to executive chairman after 15 years in the role. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 蒂姆·库克（Tim Cook）将于9月1日卸任苹果公司首席执行官，约翰·特努斯（John Ternus）将接任，库克在担任该职位15年后转任执行董事长。@wfwitness
